From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

**FC Nyva Myronivka** was a [Ukrainian](/wiki/Ukraine "Ukraine") football club from [Myronivka](/wiki/Myronivka "Myronivka"), [Kyiv Oblast](/wiki/Kyiv_Oblast "Kyiv Oblast").

It entered the professional competitions for the [1992-93 Ukrainian Third League](/wiki/1992-93_Ukrainian_Third_League "1992-93 Ukrainian Third League") season as *Nyva-Borysfen Myronivka*. It was promoted as Borysfen to the [1993-94 Ukrainian Second League](/wiki/1993-94_Ukrainian_Second_League "1993-94 Ukrainian Second League") changing its name to [FC Boryspil](/wiki/FC_Boryspil "FC Boryspil").

The same year for [1993–94](/wiki/1993-94_Ukrainian_Third_League "1993-94 Ukrainian Third League") season, another Nyva Myronivka appeared and continued to play in lower leagues until the [1996–97](/wiki/1996-97_Ukrainian_Second_League "1996-97 Ukrainian Second League") season.

    | [1992–93](/wiki/1992%E2%80%9393_Ukrainian_Transitional_League "1992–93 Ukrainian Transitional League") | 3rd (lower) | **4** | 34 | 19 | 7 | 8 | 45 | 28 | **45** |  |  |  | Promoted as [FC Boryspil](/wiki/FC_Boryspil "FC Boryspil") |

## Managers

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=FC_Nyva_Myronivka&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Managers")]

List of managers[[1]](#cite_note-1)

* 1992 – 1993 Volodymyr Kolomiets (Nyva-Borysfen Myronivka)
* 1994 – 1995 Pavlo Neverov (Nyva Karapyshi/Myronivka)
* 1995 – 1996 Volodymyr Spiridonov
* 1996 Viktor Ishchenko
* 1996 – 1997 Ivan Fliashko
